violations.text: Deli meat, egg salad, seafood salad and tuna salad was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

Various foods were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food was re-located at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025
The chest freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice buildup. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The door to the outside, located in the storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Onions, chicken and several drinks were observed stored on the floor in the Walk-in cooler and back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The floors have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The walls in the dry storage area are in poor repair, observed holes with exposed sheetrock/concrete/installation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the following areas. 1. Basement 2. Outside (linens, debris) Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
